calendar.matters:
To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Off Calendar

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Continued To Sep-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case #286184 (Conservatorship of Ann Collins).

Appearances: Joel Blackman for the San Francisco Public Guardian. Brian Connors for Janet Plannels. Roger Meredith for Audrey Collins.

Mr. Blackman requested a continuance stating that Jonathan Ferdon was on vacation. Both matters were continued to September 30, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Continued To Jul-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Continued To Apr-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called with case #286184 (Conservatorship of Ann Collins).
Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Guardian (SFPG). Brian Connors for Janet Plannels (Trustee).

Mr. Connors informed the Court that half the matter had settled and that a petition to approve the settlement would be filed within 30 days. The matter was continued to April 23, 2008 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Continued To Jan-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with line #21 case #286184 (Conservatroship of Ann Collins). Jonathan Ferdon appeared for the San Francisco Public Administrator. Brian Connors appeared for Trustee.

The parties agreed to go to mediation. The court referred both matters to Pro Bono Mediation, (two orders signed for the same). Mediation is to be completed by January 18, 2008. Both matters were continued for status on medaition to january 29, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Bailiff: Rich Lee. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Oct-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 286184. Brian Connors appearing for Janet Plannels, trustee of the Ed Marenco, Jr. Trust. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for all related cases. Some of the issues are resolved. Ms. Darlison will be dismissed. Counsel are working toward resolving the rest of the issues. Matter is continued to 10/10.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Continued To Jul-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 288377. Michael Freedman appearing for Tam Ravenhill, former successor trustee of the Ed Marenco, Jr. Trust. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Guardian. Brian Connors appearing for Janet Planells, trustee of the Ed Marenco Trust. Angela Mitchell appearing for Adurey Collins, beneficiary. Issues addressed. The Public Guardian needs authority to transfer the real property. All parties agreed the 1997 Quit Claim Deed is void because Ed Marenco died in 1992. Ms. Mitchell is objecting to authority to appoint independant counsel for Ann Collins. The PG wants independant counsel or investigator to look into the signing of the 1997 Quit Claim Deed which was notarized. Mr. Freedman argued that the deed should be set aside rather than quit claim. Court does not agreed. Petition for instructions is granted. Mr. Ferdon will prepare an order. Matter is continued to 7/25 for status on transfer of property.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Continued To May-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Continued To Apr-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Michael Freedman appearing for former trustee Tam Ravenhill. Brian Connors appearing for trustee Janet Plannels. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for the Ann Collins Trust and conservatorship. Accounting filed by Ms. Ravenhill is not set for hearing. The hearing for appointment of a successor trustee in the Anita Marenco Trust is set for next week. The Public Guardian will have standing when they are appointed. Issue on the title of the York Street property addressed. Matter is continued to 4/11/07 for status hearing.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Guardian, Conservator of the Person and Estate of Ann Collins); Brian Connors (Counsel for Janet Plannels, Successor Trustee); Roger Meredith (Counsel for Audrey Collins, beneficiary); Laura Jane Coles (Counsel for Tam Ravenhill).

All counsel reported on the status of the various matters before the Court, including factual and legal issues concerning their respective clients. As a result, it was agreed, and the Court so ordered, that Tam Ravenhill will prepare an accounting (such as it may be) for the Ed Marenco Jr. Trust for the period of her trusteeship which will be filed and served on or before January 3, 2007. The Court further ordered that Ms. Ravenhill and her prior counsel (unidentified at time of hearing) shall be made available for examination by other counsel. Finally, the Court ordered hearing on the matter now before the court continued to January 17, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 at which time the requested accounting and all other issues will be addressed and/or reviewed. Mr. Collins is to prepare the order.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Trudy Verzosa.

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Continued To Nov-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Establish Ownership To Property, For An Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Continued To Oct-23-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. To Remove Trustee T. Darlison And Appt. Succ.

Pet. To Remove Trustee T. Darlison And Appt. Succ.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Continued To Aug-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. To Remove Trustee T. Darlison And Appt. Succ.
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Continued To Jun-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN FERDON FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC GUARDIAN; MICHAEL FREEDMAN FOR TRUSTEE; BRIAN CONNERS FOR JANET PLANELLS; JOHN MANGINI FOR HOWARD COLLINS. THIS MATTER IS HEARD WITH LINE 36 CASE #287704. THE PARTIES PRESENT ARGUMENT. THE COURT IS INFORMED THAT THERE IS A RELATED PROBATE MATTER PENDING IN SANTA CLARA COUNTY. THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO JUNE 5, 2006 FOR STATUS ON THE SANTA CLARA COUNTY MATTER.

Pet. To Remove Trustee T. Darlison And Appt. Succ.
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Continued To Apr-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. John Mangini appearing for Howard Collins, petitioner in the Ed Marenco Trust. Audrey Collins, proposed successor trustee is in court. Tam Ravinhill, trustee is also in court. Ms. Ravinhill's counsel is retired. His law office is still in business. She wants a continuance to review the petition.Matter is continued to 4/10. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.
